positive: A stylized, continuous line-art depiction of a whimsical forest scene. The main subject is a gentle, glowing pathway winding through giant bioluminescent mushrooms and oversized ferns. Include silhouette elements of friendly woodland creatures—a hare leaping, a fox peeking, and a trio of stylized owls perched on branches. The style must be clean, minimalist, and highly symmetrical. Utilize a limited color palette of deep indigo, electric teal, and soft gold accents. Composition should be circular and centered, designed to wrap seamlessly around an apparel item. Perfect vector quality, high contrast, clean solid lines, flat digital art, pop art influence, sticker design.
